title: Amtech F1425 6 Piece titanium flat wood bit set
features: DURABLE: Designed for cutting holes in wood, this 6 piece set has tough, titanium coated flat wood drill bits to ensure a clean cut
FOR DRILLING HOLES IN WOOD: The 150mm bits have hex shaped stems and come in lengths 10mm, 12mm, 16mm, 19mm, 20mm and 25mm
EASY STORAGE: The set is provided in a handy storage pouch
ERGONOMIC GRIP: Comfortable to hold for better control
DIY & TRADE USE: Reliable choice for both professionals and home projects
description: Product Description Am-Tech DIY and Tool products come with a twelve month guarantee and are built for the rigors of the typical English home owner and the DIY jobs expected. The range includes a comprehensive range of hand tools for every job. Am-Tech also offer a range of power tools that not only provide a reliable level of service, but also look great as a present or gift in colour boxes and double blister displays.
